name: anonymous fresh user gets coaching with NO signup nudge in turns 0–4
description: First-impression window. The funnel intentionally leaves the agent unrestricted for the first 5 turns so the user gets a clean coaching experience before any conversion ask. Negative-case fixture: regardless of how friendly/persistence-adjacent the user message sounds, the agent must NOT call `auth_user` on turns 0–4. Surfacing signup too early erodes trust and converts worse than waiting. The soft nudge starts at turn 5 (the `usage_free_signup_soft_one_mention` fixture covers that boundary).
